tasks.title: Move docs/design/change-orchestrator.md into the borrow-gentle-orchestrator archive

subtasks.title: Snapshot pre-move SHA-256: sha256sum HEAD:docs/design/change-orchestrator.md (record as SRC_SHA). Verify .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/ exists and contains design.md, exploration.md, prd.md, etc. (no mkdir needed per design.md Move mechanics).
subtasks.scenario: archive target contains the relocated doc

subtasks.title: Run: git mv docs/design/change-orchestrator.md .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/change-orchestrator.md (history-following rename, no content edits).
subtasks.scenario: source path absent at HEAD

subtasks.title: Create .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/archive-summary.md naming the relocated file change-orchestrator.md and linking to the whole-repo-cleanup-review change so the archive stays discoverable.
subtasks.scenario: archive target contains the relocated doc

subtasks.title: Patch archive-internal citations of the old docs/design/change-orchestrator.md path inside .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/** that represent active cross-references (not historical evidence) to the new path. See design.md Move mechanics step 5 + no-stale-references spec.
subtasks.scenario: archive-internal citations point at the new path

subtasks.title: Stage and commit with conventional commit message (no AI attribution): docs(cleanup): relocate change-orchestrator design into borrow-gentle-orchestrator archive. Body must mention history-following via git mv, the byte-identical invariant, and a link to the whole-repo-cleanup-review change.
subtasks.scenario: pre-move SHA equals post-move SHA

subtasks.title: Done-when assertions: (a) test -e docs/design/change-orchestrator.md fails and test -e .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/change-orchestrator.md passes; (b) sha256sum of the new path equals SRC_SHA; (c) git log -1 --name-status --diff-filter=R shows the rename at 100% similarity with zero content-changing lines; (d) git diff HEAD~1 --stat docs/design/ shows exactly one affected file.
subtasks.scenario: no in-flight edits are bundled with the move

subtasks.title: Done-when: git log --follow .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/change-orchestrator.md returns at least one prior commit with docs/design/change-orchestrator.md as the rename source (history-following invariant).
subtasks.scenario: git log --follow returns prior commits

subtasks.title: Done-when: the diff for this commit shows zero files added/removed/modified under docs/design/ other than the renamed change-orchestrator.md (no collateral damage in docs/design/).
subtasks.scenario: only one file in docs/design/ is touched

tasks.title: Delete superseded ADR 0011 with supersedes rationale in commit body

subtasks.title: Run: git rm docs/adr/0011-planning-entry-agent-and-size-routing.md (stages the deletion; preserves prior content in git history).
subtasks.scenario: ADR 0011 path is gone

subtasks.title: Commit with conventional message (no AI attribution): docs(cleanup): delete superseded ADR 0011. Body must capture the supersedes set: docs/design/change-orchestrator.md (relocated in this change), ADR 0012 (file-backed changes disk state machine), ADR 0013 (change orchestrator worktree branch PR-agnostic), ADR 0014 (change orchestrator deep modules). Body must also state prior content is recoverable via: git show HEAD^:docs/adr/0011-planning-entry-agent-and-size-routing.md. See design.md Delete mechanics for the full body template.
subtasks.scenario: successor ADRs are referenced as the supersedes set

subtasks.title: Done-when: for every surviving file f under docs/adr/ other than 0011, sha256sum(HEAD:f) equals sha256sum(HEAD^:f). In particular both 0008-worktree-current-branch-and-delete.md and 0008-copilot-loop-agents-native-model.md are byte-identical (no-stale-references + preserve-0008-collision-context spec).
subtasks.scenario: surviving ADRs are byte-identical

subtasks.title: Done-when: docs/adr/0012-file-backed-changes-disk-state-machine.md, docs/adr/0013-change-orchestrator-worktree-branch-pr-agnostic.md, and docs/adr/0014-change-orchestrator-deep-modules.md all exist at HEAD and are byte-identical to pre-cleanup content (successor ADRs preserve 0011 context).
subtasks.scenario: successor ADRs exist and are unchanged

subtasks.title: Done-when: ls docs/adr/ shows no file matching 0011-* (no tombstone, no 0011-SUPERSEDED.md, no placeholder). Numeric sequence skips from 0010 (or prior) directly to 0012.
subtasks.scenario: ADR 0010 (or the prior ADR) is preserved as the new boundary

subtasks.title: Done-when: git show HEAD^:docs/adr/0011-planning-entry-agent-and-size-routing.md exits 0 and returns the full pre-cleanup markdown content (recoverability invariant).
subtasks.scenario: prior content retrievable from parent commit

subtasks.title: Done-when: git diff HEAD~1 --stat docs/adr/ shows exactly one affected file (the deletion). Both 0008 files are absent from the diff (preserve-0008-collision-context negative assertion).
subtasks.scenario: worktree 0008 is not in the cleanup diff

tasks.title: Verify cleanup: history-follow, no-stale-references sweep, and negative-assertion checks (skills, runtime prompt, 0008 collision)

subtasks.title: Run: git log --follow .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/change-orchestrator.md and capture output proving at least one prior commit has docs/design/change-orchestrator.md as the rename source. Captures the archive-design-doc history-following invariant end-to-end.
subtasks.scenario: git log --follow returns prior commits

subtasks.title: Run: rg -n "docs/design/change-orchestrator\.md" -g "!.git/" -g "!.ai-harness/changes/archive/**". Done-when: zero hits outside the archive (the moved file is at the archive path; any hit here is an unpatched active-doc reference).
subtasks.scenario: zero hits for the moved-file path pattern

subtasks.title: Run: rg -n "0011-planning-entry-agent-and-size-routing" -g "!.git/" -g "!.ai-harness/changes/archive/**". Done-when: zero hits (the file is gone; any hit is an unpatched active-doc reference).
subtasks.scenario: zero hits for the deleted-ADR filename pattern

subtasks.title: Run: rg -n "ADR 0011" -g "!.git/" -g "!.ai-harness/changes/archive/**". Done-when: zero hits (the ADR is gone; any hit is an unpatched active-doc claim about 0011 still being load-bearing).
subtasks.scenario: zero hits for the deleted-ADR label pattern

subtasks.title: If any active-doc hit is found in subtasks 3.2-3.4, the sweep is NOT done. Patch via path rewrite (docs/design/change-orchestrator.md -> the new archive path) or rewrite of load-bearing claims to cite the actual successor (ADR 0014 or the relocated design doc), then re-run the sweep. archive-internal hits inside .ai-harness/changes/archive/borrow-gentle-orchestrator/** are permitted as historical evidence only if scoped/annotated.
subtasks.scenario: an "ADR 0011 is load-bearing" claim in active docs

subtasks.title: Negative-assertion guard (preserve-skills-and-runtime-prompt): enumerate every file under .agents/skills/ and .claude/skills/ pre-cleanup, sha256 them, then re-sha256 at HEAD. Done-when: every file is byte-identical, the file sets are equal, and zero files under .agents/skills/ or .claude/skills/ appear in `git diff HEAD~3..HEAD --stat`.
subtasks.scenario: every skill file in .agents/skills/ is byte-identical

subtasks.title: Negative-assertion guard (preserve-skills-and-runtime-prompt): SRC_SHA = sha256sum HEAD~3:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-orchestrator.md. Done-when: sha256sum HEAD:src/ai_harness/resources/change-agent/change-orchestrator.md equals SRC_SHA AND the path is absent from `git diff HEAD~3..HEAD --stat` (runtime prompt is the load-bearing product source, must not drift).
subtasks.scenario: runtime prompt SHA is invariant

subtasks.title: Negative-assertion guard (preserve-0008-collision-context): SRC_SHA_worktree = sha256sum HEAD~3:docs/adr/0008-worktree-current-branch-and-delete.md and SRC_SHA_copilot = sha256sum HEAD~3:docs/adr/0008-copilot-loop-agents-native-model.md. Done-when: both HEAD SHAs equal their pre-cleanup SHAs AND neither path appears in `git diff HEAD~3..HEAD --stat` (collision resolution is out of scope; both files must persist byte-identical).
subtasks.scenario: worktree 0008 SHA is invariant

subtasks.title: Optional, cheap verification commit: capture the verification evidence (rename-hunk similarity, post-move SHA, `git log --follow` head, the three grep patterns with hit counts = 0, and the negative-assertion SHA verdicts) as .ai-harness/changes/whole-repo-cleanup-review/verification.log so future auditors can replay the sweep without re-running it. Conventional commit (no AI attribution): chore(cleanup): add verification log for whole-repo cleanup.
subtasks.scenario: the sweep returns a clean exit
